prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约1730→1570→1407→1410→1917，2021至2023年位次逐年前移（竞争加剧），2024年基本持平，2025年大幅后移至1917名（近5年最易进），较2024年后移约507名；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年54人、2022年54人、2023年46人、2024年44人、2025年46人；2026年物理类计划大幅扩至94人，较2025年增加48人（增幅约104%），属极大幅度扩招，显著缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，共享哈工大软科排名，2026年软科主榜第12名，属全国顶尖工科院校层次，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量极高，反映报考关注度持续升温，对位次前移有正向推动作用；共享哈工大学科评估结果：机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、力学A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、仪器科学与技术A、土木工程A、电气工程A等，工科实力全国顶尖，对理科考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度契合；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万（含不确定标记），较2025年物理类55.5万+历史类35.2万合计约90.7万大幅增长，竞争基数扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年极大幅度扩招（+104%）对竞争压力的显著缓解、学校顶尖层次与高热度的正向吸引力、以及河南省考生总数大幅增加带来的竞争加剧，考虑学校层次与热度对位次的拉动作用，适当收窄后移幅度；预测2026年物理类最低位次约3067名，区间2699–3435名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（计算机与电子通信）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（计算机科学与技术、通信工程）
- 工科试验班（自主智能）（人工智能、机器人工程、自动化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 工科试验班（未来智造卓越联培班）（集成电路设计与集成系统、电气工程及其自动化）
- 工科试验班（未来能源卓越联培班）（材料科学与工程、能源与动力工程、工程力学）
- 数学与应用数学（卓越联培班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类预测位次约3067名，区间2699–3435名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<2699名）可重点冲击一档计算机与电子通信类专业；位次接近区间上限（>3435名）建议以三档为主，兼顾二档。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 1730 → 1570 → 1407 → 1410 → 1917. Rankings moved forward year by year from 2021 to 2023 (increased competition), remained basically flat in 2024, and significantly moved back to 1917 in 2025 (easiest entry in the past 5 years), moving back about 507 places compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for science/physics category in Henan Province: 54 in 2021, 54 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 44 in 2024, 46 in 2025. In 2026, the physics category plan greatly expands to 94, an increase of 48 compared to 2025 (approximately 104% increase), which is an extremely large expansion, significantly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, sharing HIT's Soft Science ranking. In 2026, it ranks 12th on the Soft Science main list, belonging to the national top engineering school level, with strong attraction to candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin heat total ranking 10th (high heat), extremely high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention, which has a positive driving effect on ranking advancement. Sharing HIT's discipline evaluation results: Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Instrument Science and Technology A, Civil Engineering A, Electrical Engineering A, etc. Engineering strength is top nationally, with strong attraction to science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with the school's advantageous disciplines. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Henan Province in 2026 is approximately 1.2 million (including uncertain marks), a significant increase from the total of about 907,000 in 2025 (555,000 physics + 352,000 history), expanding the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the benchmark of a significant ranking backward shift in 2025, the significant alleviation of competitive pressure from the extremely large enrollment expansion in 2026 (+104%), the positive attraction of the school's top level and high heat, and the intensified competition from the large increase in total candidates in Henan Province, considering the pulling effect of school level and heat on rankings, appropriately narrow the backward shift range. Predict the minimum ranking for physics category in 2026 to be approximately 3067, with a range of 2699–3435.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronic Communication)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Joint Training Class) (Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Energy Excellent Joint Training Class) (Materials Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Engineering Mechanics)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Excellent Joint Training Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future City Excellent Joint Training Class) (Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the predicted ranking for physics category is approximately 3067, with a range of 2699–3435. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, Tier 1 for sprinting, and Tier 3 for safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2699) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 computer and electronic communication majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (>3435) are advised to focus on Tier 3, while also considering Tier 2.
